description: Statement to the youth of the Jewish community in Cairo explaining the vices of its members, their selfishness, and that the interests of the community are in danger – undated – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 123) – in Arabic. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 60). MCD.
